channel.title: Dark Files
channel.description: Two hosts. Countless cases. Dark Files dives deep into the most chilling true crime stories — cold cases, unsolved murders, and the cases that haunt us. New episodes every week. Be wrapt up, be nosy, stay safe.
channel.itunes:author: Dark Files Podcast

item.title: The Vanishing of Maura Murray
item.description: A college student's disappearance after a car crash leaves behind a trail of unanswered questions.
item.itunes:title: The Vanishing of Maura Murray
item.itunes:author: Dark Files Podcast
